label.description: A human-readable label for the target

paths.description: List of file paths or glob patterns to watch for changes

file.description: Path to the file containing the version information

type.description: The type of project manifest file to parse for version information

version.description: Configuration for how to extract version information for this target

tagPrefix.description: An optional prefix to find tags that represent versions for this target (e.g. "foo@v" to match tags like "foo@v1.2.3")

enabled.description: Whether to create/update a live release pull request. If omitted, the target inherits the global create-release-pr setting.

branchPrefix.description: An optional prefix for the release PR branch name (e.g. "rellu/app1/")

baseBranch.description: The base branch to use for the release PR (defaults to the default branch of the repository)

releasePr.description: Optional per-target overrides for release pull request behavior

categoryMap.description: Mapping of commit types to changelog categories (e.g. "feat" -> "Features")

sectionOrder.description: The order in which to display sections in the generated changelog.

changelog.description: Configuration for how to generate the changelog content

$schema.description: The $schema property is optional and can be used to reference the schema in config files

description: The configuration loaded from the rellu.json file in the repository
